title: GlobaPharm
overview: GlobaPharm is a global pharmaceutical company evaluating an acquisition target in the biotech space. McKinsey has been asked to help assess the deal rationale and integration considerations.
prompt: GlobaPharm is a large global pharmaceutical company. They are considering acquiring a mid-sized biotech firm and have asked McKinsey to help evaluate the strategic rationale and key risks of the acquisition. [Full case content coming soon]
